Operation 'createConversation' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about what inputs are required (member IDs, metadata), what the response contains (conversation ID, object structure), and side effects (conversation becomes available for messaging). Added these details for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Create a new conversation with specified members.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new conversation with specified members in the Kommunicate platform. Accepts a CreateConversationRequest containing member IDs and conversation metadata. Returns the newly created conversation object with a unique conversation ID. The conversation is immediately available for messaging and agent assignment.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what inputs are required (member IDs, metadata), what the response contains (conversation ID, object structure), and side effects (conversation becomes available for messaging). Added these details for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getUserDetail' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is generic ('Get user detail' could apply to many operations). Description lacks specificity about input format (array of IDs), output structure (UserDetail objects), and error handling. Enhanced both for clarity and AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve details for one or more users by their IDs.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve user details by user IDs
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed user information for one or more users by their IDs. Accepts a GetUserDetailRequest containing an array of user IDs. Returns a UserDetail object or array of UserDetail objects containing user profile information, contact details, and metadata. Requires valid user IDs; non-existent IDs will be skipped or return errors.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic ('Get user detail' could apply to many operations). Description lacks specificity about input format (array of IDs), output structure (UserDetail objects), and error handling. Enhanced both for clarity and AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'sendMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal. Missing details about required inputs (conversation ID, message content, sender), response format (message ID, timestamp), and side effects (message visibility, notifications). data.current_description: Send a message to a conversation.
data.description_suggestion: Sends a text message to a specified conversation in the Kommunicate platform. Accepts a SendMessageRequest containing the conversation ID, message content, and sender information. Returns a confirmation response with the message ID and timestamp. The message is immediately visible to all conversation participants and triggers notifications based on user preferences.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Missing details about required inputs (conversation ID, message content, sender), response format (message ID, timestamp), and side effects (message visibility, notifications). Added these details for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Send a message with file attachment to a conversation.
data.description_suggestion: Sends a message with a file attachment to a specified conversation. Accepts a SendAttachmentRequest containing the conversation ID, file data, and optional message text. Returns a confirmation response with the message ID, attachment metadata, and file URL. The attachment is stored and accessible to all conversation participants.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about input requirements (file data format, conversation ID), response details (attachment metadata, file URL), and side effects (file storage, participant access). Enhanced for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Change the status of a conversation (open, closed, spam).
data.description_suggestion: Changes the status of a conversation to one of the supported states: open, closed, or spam. Requires conversation ID and new status as parameters. Returns the updated conversation object with the new status and timestamp of the change. Status changes affect conversation visibility, routing, and participant notifications. Closed conversations can be reopened; spam-marked conversations are flagged for review.
data.reasoning: Description mentions status options but lacks details about required parameters (conversation ID), response format (updated conversation object), and important side effects (visibility changes, routing effects, notification behavior, reopening capability). Added comprehensive details for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Updates user profile information including name, email, phone, and custom attributes. Accepts an UpdateUserRequest containing the user ID and fields to update. data.current_description: Change the assigned agent for a conversation.
data.description_suggestion: Reassigns a conversation from the current agent to a different agent or agent group. Requires conversation ID and new assignee ID (agent or group) as parameters. Returns a ChangeAssigneeResponse containing the updated conversation assignment, previous assignee, new assignee, and timestamp. The previous agent is notified of the reassignment; the new agent receives the conversation in their queue. Reassignment affects conversation routing and SLA timers.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about required parameters (conversation ID, assignee ID), response structure (ChangeAssigneeResponse fields), and important side effects (agent notifications, queue routing, SLA impact). Added these details for comprehensive AI agent understanding of operation mechanics and consequences.
